name: Brenda & Steve Catalano — 7-day pre-tasting cadence
description: B&S's dedicated 7-day plan. Day 1 fires TWO sends — SMS to Brenda first, email to both Brenda and Steve a few minutes later (operator-to-operator framing, fee-waiver, venue ask). Days 2/3/5/7 passive. Day 4 SMS to Brenda conditional on no reply. Day 6 ALWAYS fires (operational confirmation email to both, regardless of reply state) at 1pm; pre-tasting brief lands in Andre's Slack at 6pm the same Saturday. Day 7 is the in-person tasting on May 3 at 5:30pm — system silent, Andre runs it. R1 heartbeat treats Steve writing directly as ALWAYS escalation (operator-grade signal). Daughter or fiancé engaging = plan-redesign trigger.

batch_policy.notes: One lead, one tasting, one shot.

principles: This is a don't-fumble-it lead, not a convince-them lead. They came in warm.
Steve writing directly = STRONGEST possible signal. He doesn't email vendors. Pause and page Andre.
Day 6 is operational confirmation, not follow-up. ALWAYS sends. Steve will read it as competence.
On Day 1, fire SMS first, then email. Order matters — SMS is personal, email is the formal version. Reverse looks like the system, not Andre.

nodes.label: R2 plan executor — 1pm weekdays
nodes.notes: Brenda checks her phone after lunch — afternoon cron is intentional.
nodes.description: Each weekday at 1pm ET, R2 wakes and asks: what does today's plan-day call for?

nodes.label: R1 comms heartbeat — every 10 min
nodes.notes: Watches Close for any inbound from Brenda or Steve. Steve writing = ALWAYS escalation.
nodes.description: Every 10 minutes during business hours, R1 polls. Steve direct-engagement is the signal that pages Andre.

nodes.label: Close: lead.activity (B&S)
nodes.notes: Optional faster path — Close webhook fires immediately on Brenda or Steve activity.
nodes.description: Close webhook short-circuits the 10-min poll when wired.

nodes.label: R3 pre-tasting brief — May 2 6pm
nodes.notes: One-shot — Saturday May 2 at 6pm, the night before the May 3 5:30pm tasting.
nodes.description: May 2 at 6pm, R3 lands the full pre-tasting brief in Andre's Slack.

nodes.label: Run on demand
nodes.notes: Manual override.
nodes.description: Manual button on B&S's lead box to re-fire today's planned move.

nodes.label: people/brenda_steve.json
nodes.notes: Their identity record — Italian-American Fitchburg, daughter's wedding, allergen-aware.
nodes.description: Bedrock identity for Brenda & Steve — daughter as emotional anchor, Italian-American family.

nodes.label: people/andre_raw.json
nodes.notes: Andre's voice profile.
nodes.description: Andre's voice handling. Drafts mirror his peer register.

nodes.label: Drive: B&S cadence state
nodes.notes: last-move-fired.txt tracks BOTH slots — 'Day 1 · sms' and 'Day 1 · email' are separate lines.
nodes.description: Cadence working memory — Day 1's two slots tracked separately so partial-failure retries cleanly.

nodes.label: Compute plan day
nodes.notes: Day 1 = plan-start. Day > 7 → DM Andre and exit.
nodes.description: Subtracts plan-start from today. Exits past Day 7.

nodes.label: Escalation pause?
nodes.notes: Hard pause. Steve writing already triggered this if it happened.
nodes.description: Safety gate. Steve direct-engagement, daughter writing, or hostile = hold.

nodes.label: Inbound from Brenda or Steve?
nodes.notes: Day 4 only — gates skip on inbound. Day 1 + Day 6 don't gate.
nodes.description: Inbound counter for Day 4's skip-on-reply rule.

nodes.label: Day 1 — SMS to Brenda (fee waiver)
nodes.notes: Fires FIRST on Day 1. Drops the tasting fee, asks for venue name. Personal, lowercase.
nodes.description: Day 1 slot 1 — SMS to Brenda. Personal, lowercase, fee-waiver, venue ask.

nodes.label: Day 1 — Email to BOTH

config.subject: Confirming May 3rd — and dropping the tasting fee

nodes.notes: Fires ~2 min after the SMS. Operator-to-operator framing aimed at Steve.
nodes.description: Day 1 slot 2 — email to both. Steve reads this. Operator-grade language, 4:30 setup, allergen labeling.

nodes.label: Day 4 — SMS to Brenda (conditional)
nodes.notes: Lowercase 'just bumping this up' framing. Skips if either replied since Day 1.
nodes.description: Day 4 — gentle bump. Skips on any reply since Day 1.

nodes.label: Day 6 — Email to BOTH (ALWAYS)

config.subject: Sunday at 5:30 — quick prep before you come in

nodes.notes: ALWAYS fires regardless of reply state. Operational confirmation, not follow-up.
nodes.description: Day 6 — operational pre-tasting confirmation. Always sends. Three operational items, planner invitation.

nodes.label: Rodbot voice mirror
nodes.notes: Renders each draft in Andre's voice. Different shapes for SMS-to-Brenda vs email-to-both.
nodes.description: Voice composer. Andre's register, with Italian-American family warmth and operator-respect for Steve.

nodes.label: R3 — pre-tasting brief composer
nodes.notes: Composes the May 2 6pm Slack brief.
nodes.description: R3's brief. Recent comms, opener line for Andre to use close to verbatim, allergen-table check, agreement-ready note.

nodes.label: Classify reply (Brenda vs Steve)
nodes.notes: STEVE WRITING = ALWAYS escalation, even if friendly. Plan literally says: he doesn't email vendors.
nodes.description: Classifier with B&S-specific rule: Steve direct-engagement, regardless of tone, is the strongest possible signal.

nodes.label: Escalation?
nodes.notes: More aggressive than Hugo's gate — Steve direct = automatic pause.
nodes.description: Pause triggers. Steve = automatic. Daughter or fiancé = plan-redesign trigger.

nodes.label: Slack DM — Andre
nodes.notes: Two formats: 🟢 Brenda routine reply, 🚨 Steve / daughter / hostile escalation.
nodes.description: Andre's single Slack channel. Brenda routine = green ping, Steve direct = red page.

nodes.label: Slack receipt — every send
nodes.notes: Mirrors verbatim copy of every send. Day 1 = TWO receipts (SMS, then email).
nodes.description: Send receipts. Two on Day 1, one on Day 4 (or skip notice), one on Day 6, one for the brief on Saturday 6pm.

nodes.label: _ledger/activity.jsonl
nodes.notes: Append-only audit.
nodes.description: Every R2 fire + R1 ping appends one line.

nodes.label: state/today.html
nodes.notes: B&S row on Andre's morning briefing.
nodes.description: B&S's row on the daily briefing — current plan day, last move, tasting countdown.

nodes.label: Mission-control: B&S cell
nodes.notes: Live tile.
nodes.description: Mission-control tile — plan day, next fire, days until May 3 tasting.

connections.label: read state
connections.description: R2 reads plan-start, last-fired, pause flag.

connections.label: no pause
connections.description: Pause clear → continue. Pause set → DM Andre and exit.

connections.label: draft compose
connections.description: Hand the right template to Rodbot for voice rendering.

connections.label: Day 1 slot 1
connections.description: Day 1 first send — SMS to Brenda.

connections.label: +2 min, email
connections.description: After SMS sends, fire the email to both ~2 min later. SAME run.

connections.label: Day 6
connections.description: Day 6 email — ALWAYS fires regardless of reply.

connections.label: context
connections.description: Rodbot reads B&S record for daughter / Steve / allergen context.

connections.label: receipt 2
connections.description: Day 1 email receipt to Slack — Andre sees both Day-1 sends.

connections.label: write pause flag
connections.description: Steve / daughter / hostile → write the pause flag.

connections.label: page andre
connections.description: Andre sees the verbatim message + plan's next move (or 'cadence held').

connections.label: brief Andre
connections.description: Full pre-tasting brief lands in Andre's Slack the night before.

connections.label: tile
connections.description: Tile updates with plan_day + tasting countdown.
